name: Global Weather
shortDesc: Fetch real-time, highly accurate global weather and forecast data.
description: The Global Weather API provides instant access to hyper-local, real-time weather conditions anywhere on earth. Powered by top-tier meteorological models, it returns temperature, humidity, wind speeds, and precipitation.
howItWorks: Our API queries global meteorological models for the exact location.
Real-time climate data is instantly returned in standardized JSON.
useCases: Triggering home automation based on weather
Adding climate data to travel itineraries
